originalSummary: X admonished for "fishing expedition" as judge dismisses ad boycott lawsuit.

title: 维基百科严厉打击在文章写作中使用人工智能
originalTitle: Wikipedia cracks down on the use of AI in article writing
summary: 该网站的政策可能会发生变化，一直在努力解决人工智能生成的写作问题。
originalSummary: The site, whose policies are subject to change, has struggled with the issue of AI-generated writing.

title: 伊隆·马斯克的X广告抵制诉讼被美国法官驳回
originalTitle: Elon Musk's X advertising boycott lawsuit dismissed by US judge
summary: 美国地区法官简·博伊尔（ Jane Boyle ）表示，该公司未能证明其受到联邦竞争法的任何损害。
originalSummary: US District Judge Jane Boyle said the company had failed to show it had suffered any harm under federal competition laws.

title: “社交媒体改变游戏规则的时刻” --在具有里程碑意义的成瘾判决之后，大型科技公司的下一步是什么？
originalTitle: 'A game-changing moment for social media' - what next for big tech after landmark addiction verdict?
summary: BBC技术编辑佐伊·克莱曼（ Zoe Kleinman ）写道，这一裁决可能是我们所知的社交媒体终结的开始。
originalSummary: The ruling could be the beginning of the end of social media as we know it, writes the BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman.
